metadata.name: Schedule a Story for Later Publication

description: A story is finished and edited, but the editor wants to publish it next morning during peak traffic hours.

nodes.task_description: Upload and format the final version of the article in the CMS.

expected_outcome.expected: The article is ready for publication.

nodes.task_description: Instead of clicking 'Publish', use the 'Schedule' function in the CMS.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent navigates to the scheduling tool.

nodes.task_description: Set the publication date and time for 7 AM the next day.

expected_outcome.expected: The article is scheduled to go live at the desired time.
